text.title: Product Discovery Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Product Discovery.

example.scenario: Idea: 'AI changelog bot'. Risks: value (do solo devs want it? — 5 interviews → 4/5 yes); usability (Figma proto → 5/5 complete); feasibility (spike via Claude API → works in <100 lines); viability (model: 50 customers @ $9 → $450/mo, infra $20/mo). Verdict: go.
